$schema_note: Phase 1 — QR Attendance engine, live monitoring, and the corrections workflow. This is the system's primary module (system-overview.json#system.primary_module) and its highest-risk area (testing-definition.json#strategy: 'QR/attendance logic is the highest-risk area and gets the deepest coverage'). Every task here should be treated as critical priority by default.

work_packages.name: QR Attendance Engine
work_packages.goal: Session lifecycle, dynamic QR regenerating every 60s (encrypted, time-limited), static QR option for events, scanner, server-side validation, duplicate prevention, manual fallback.

tasks.title: class_sessions Prisma model
tasks.description: status enum (SCHEDULED/OPEN/CLOSED/CANCELLED), qr_mode enum (DYNAMIC/STATIC), qr_secret bytea (server-only, never in selects), summary jsonb snapshot, unique(offering_id, schedule_id, date) where schedule_id not null.
acceptance_criteria: qr_secret excluded from all Prisma selects exposed to serializers (verified by test)
partial index class_sessions(status) where status='OPEN'

tasks.title: attendance_records Prisma model (core fact table, BR-01)
tasks.description: status enum (PRESENT/LATE/ABSENT/EXCUSED), marked_by enum, unique(session_id, student_id) — the hard duplicate-prevention guarantee at the DB level.
acceptance_criteria: unique(session_id, student_id) verified under 50-parallel-scan concurrency test (see P1.QR.QA02)

tasks.title: qrCrypto infra — AES-256-GCM payload + HMAC-SHA256 rotating token
tasks.description: token = HMAC-SHA256(sessionSecret, floor(now/60s)) truncated; payload {sessionId, token, issuedAt} encrypted with AES-256-GCM; keys/secrets never leave the server.
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests: tamper with ciphertext/auth-tag → decrypt fails cleanly
Token window math verified at 60s boundaries
tasks.risk: Highest-risk crypto code in the system — review by a second person recommended regardless of team size.

tasks.title: POST /sessions — start session
tasks.description: Validates faculty↔offering assignment + no duplicate open session; creates class_session with a random per-session secret; qrMode 'static' only if allowed in settings (flagged reduced_security).
acceptance_criteria: Static QR session records flagged reduced-security (BR-16, testing-definition.json)

tasks.title: GET /sessions/:id/qr-token + Socket.IO 60s push
tasks.description: Current encrypted rotating payload, also pushed to the faculty's session:{id} room every 60s via qr:rotate.
acceptance_criteria: Faculty-only socket rooms — students cannot join session:{id}

tasks.title: POST /attendance/scan — full validation chain
tasks.description: decrypt → integrity check → window check (±1 of 60s) → session open + before cutoff → enrollment check → INSERT (unique constraint makes duplicates a no-op 409 'already recorded') → status computed from server clock vs grace/cutoff → Socket.IO event to session room.
acceptance_criteria: Scan within grace → PRESENT; after grace → LATE; never scanned + close → ABSENT (BR-03)
Duplicate scan same session → 'already recorded', single row persists
Scan with expired token window (>±1 of 60s) → TOKEN_EXPIRED_WINDOW
Scan on closed/cancelled session → SESSION_CLOSED
Non-enrolled student scan → NOT_ENROLLED
Tampered payload (bad auth tag) → rejected and logged
tasks.risk: Single riskiest endpoint in the system — under-testing here directly causes attendance fraud or false absences.

tasks.title: POST /sessions/:id/close + session-autoclose cron (BR-14)
tasks.description: Manual close or auto-close cron at cutoff → unscanned enrolled students bulk-marked Absent → summary snapshot stored → room closed.
acceptance_criteria: Scan after cutoff time rejected; staff manual entry after cutoff allowed + audited

tasks.title: POST /sessions/:id/cancel
tasks.description: No absents recorded; reason required.

tasks.title: Manual attendance entry + override endpoints
tasks.description: POST /attendance/records (manual entry, technical-issue fallback); PATCH /attendance/records/:id (override, reason mandatory, before/after audited).
acceptance_criteria: Override without reason → VALIDATION_FAILED; with reason → audited with before/after

tasks.title: Scan rate limiting + rejected-scan logging
tasks.description: 10 scans/min per user; invalid payloads logged for anti-fraud review.

tasks.title: Faculty Live Session page (projector mode)
tasks.description: Fullscreen dynamic QR (regenerates every 60s via socket 'qr:rotate', poll fallback), class name, live Present/Late counter, side roster panel, static-QR indicator, close-session confirm with absents preview.
acceptance_criteria: Falls back to 10s polling if socket drops (per backend-architecture.json#realtime.fallback)
tasks.notes: docs/index.html already implements the visual design for this screen end-to-end — reuse, don't redesign.

tasks.title: Student Scanner page
tasks.description: Camera scan (html5-qrcode) → POST /attendance/scan → success screen (Present/Late, time) or specific error state (closed/not-enrolled/already-recorded/expired-code, prompts rescan).
acceptance_criteria: Every documented scan error code maps to a distinct, actionable message
tasks.risk: Camera permission handling across browsers/devices is a common real-world blocker — budget extra QA time.
tasks.notes: docs/index.html already implements the visual design for this screen end-to-end — reuse, don't redesign.

tasks.title: Attendance Records grid (faculty) — manual entry + override dialog
tasks.description: Filterable grid across own classes; manual entry and override dialogs with mandatory reason.
acceptance_criteria: Override dialog blocks submit until reason is filled

tasks.title: Unit + integration coverage for BR-01…BR-16 (attendance rules)
tasks.description: 90%+ line/branch coverage target on the qr-attendance service per testing-definition.json coverage_targets.
deliverables: apps/api tests for every attendance_rules scenario
acceptance_criteria: All 8 attendance_rules scenarios green in CI

tasks.title: k6 concurrency smoke test (50 parallel scans, 100-scan load)
tasks.description: 100 concurrent scans against one session — p95 < 1s, zero duplicates.
deliverables: k6 script + CI nightly job wiring
acceptance_criteria: Zero duplicate attendance_records rows under load

tasks.title: E2E: faculty start→live→scan→close→report journey
tasks.description: Playwright: login → start session → live QR rotates → simulated scans appear in roster live → close → absents auto-marked → session report correct.

work_packages.name: Attendance Monitoring
work_packages.goal: Live roster (students inside room, late list, percentages), today's classes/events, weekly/monthly statistics, history, department-wide day view.

tasks.title: Live open-sessions aggregation query
tasks.description: Powers the admin department-wide monitoring view — rooms, counts, percentages across all currently OPEN sessions.

tasks.title: Attendance Monitoring page (admin)
tasks.description: Live view of all open sessions; drill into any session; department-wide day view.

tasks.title: My Attendance page (student, filterable history)
tasks.description: Filterable history (term/subject/date/status); per-subject summaries; 'Request correction' action per record.

tasks.title: Class Detail page (faculty)
tasks.description: Roster, schedule, session history, per-student rates, export actions.

work_packages.name: Attendance Corrections Workflow
work_packages.goal: Student-filed correction requests, faculty/admin review, full audit trail.

tasks.title: attendance_corrections Prisma model
tasks.description: status enum (PENDING/APPROVED/REJECTED), reviewed_by/reviewed_at/review_note.
acceptance_criteria: partial index attendance_corrections(status) where status='PENDING'

tasks.title: Create + list corrections
tasks.description: POST /attendance/corrections (student, 5-500 char reason + optional attachment); GET filtered by status/offering.

tasks.title: Approve/reject correction
tasks.description: PATCH /attendance/corrections/:id { decision, note? } — approve updates record with marked_by=CORRECTION; reject leaves record untouched; student notified either way.
acceptance_criteria: testing-definition.json: 'Correction approve updates record...reject leaves record untouched; student notified in both cases'

tasks.title: Attachment upload validation
tasks.description: MIME + magic-byte validation, ≤5MB (pdf/jpg/png), randomized filenames, served from isolated no-execute path.
tasks.notes: Needs object storage provider decided — see SystemDefinition5.txt §9.

tasks.title: My Corrections page (student)
tasks.description: Request list with Pending/Approved/Rejected status and reviewer notes.

tasks.title: Correction Requests queue (faculty) + Correction Approvals (admin, dept-wide w/ SLA aging)
tasks.description: Queue with evidence view; approve/reject with note; admin sees department-wide with SLA aging indicators.

tasks.title: Corrections E2E journey
tasks.description: Student files correction → faculty approves → status and notification updated.
